description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Canal Road Flyover, Cross Harbour Tunnel bound, near Wan Chai Interchange
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 堅拿道天橋，往海底隧道方向，近灣仔交匯處

2024-05-09T22:01:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to emergency repair of road surface, part of the lanes of Canal Road Flyover (Cross Harbour Tunnel bound) near Wan Chai Interchange is closed to all traffic. Meanwhile, the only lane of the section of Wan Chai Interchange leading from Canal Road Flyover (North Point bound) to Victoria Park Road is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Affected bus routes have been diverted. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
